name: Withered Wastelands (Natural)
locations: Take photo and 3D print, or Magnet Rise and hold Y

name: Cotton Spores
description: Small, white tufts of cotton. Bring them to Hoppip!

name: Leppa Berry
description: A berry with a rather unremarkable flavor. Restores some PP when eaten.

name: Chesto Berry
description: A rock-hard berry with a dry flavor. Restores some PP when eaten

name: Rawst Berry
description: The longer and more curled the leaves are, the more bitter this berry tastes. Restores some PP when eaten

name: Aspear Berry
description: This berry has a distinctively sharp sour taste. Restores some PP when eaten.

name: Pecha Berry
description: A sweet, delicious berry. Restores some PP when eaten.

name: Lum Berry
description: A berry that has a well-balanced flavor. Restores some PP when eaten.

name: Bean
description: Small beans that are jam-packed with nutrients. Restores some PP when eaten

name: Tomato
description: A round, tasty-looking tomato. Restores some PP when eaten

name: Wheat
description: They're actually edible raw! Restores some PP when eaten.

name: Potato
description: A delicious potato-even with the skin still on! Restores some PP when eaten

name: Fresh carrot
description: You can harvest these spicy carrots by pulling up on their leaves. Restores some PP when eaten.

name: Seaweed
description: Seaweed that has washed ashore. Restores some PP when eaten

name: Cave mushrooms
description: Mushrooms that grow in damp places such as caves or under shady trees. Restores some PP when eaten

name: Simple salad
description: An ordinary salad made with leaves. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Leppa salad
description: A sweet salad made with Leppa Berries. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Seaweed salad
description: A bitter-tasting salad made with seaweed. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Shredded salad
description: A sour salad made with finely chopped leaves. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Crushed-berry salad
description: A salad with a dry flavor, made with crushed Chesto Berries. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Crouton salad
description: A spicy salad with a delightfully crunchy texture. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Simple soup
description: An ordinary soup made with Fresh Water. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Seaweed soup
description: A bitter-tasting soup made with seaweed.. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Mushroom soup
description: A soup with a dry flavor made with mushroom broth.. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Electrifying soup
description: A shockingly spicy soup.. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Healthy soup
description: A spicy soup with an aromatic bean flavor.. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Flavorful soup
description: A sour soup bursting with flavor. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Simple bread
description: Ordinary wheat bread. Powers up Cut when eaten.

name: Leppa bread
description: Sour-tasting bread made with Leppa Berry jam.. Powers up Cut when eaten.

name: Carrot bread
description: Spicy bread with an intense carrot flavor. Powers up Cut when eaten.

name: Recycled bread
description: Bitter-tasting bread made by reusing other bread. Powers up Cut when eaten

name: Fluffy bread
description: Sweet bread made with Pecha Berries. Powers up cut when eaten.

name: Bread bowl
description: Spicy bread that's delicious even when burnt. Powers up Cut when eaten.

name: Simple hamburger steak
description: An ordinary hamburger steak, made with beans. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten.

name: Mushroom hamburger steak
description: A hamburger steak with an intensely dry, mushroomy flavor. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten.

name: Tomato hamburger steak
description: A hamburger steak that brings out the sour flavor of its ingredients.. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten.

name: Potato hamburger steak
description: A satisfyingly sweet hamburger steak. Powers up Rock Smash a lot when eaten.

name: Bitter hamburger steak
description: A bitter-tasting hamberuger steak topped with leaves. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten

name: Vibrant hamburger steak
description: A hamburger steak made with lots of ingredients. Powers up Rock Smash a lot when eaten

name: Bruised berry
description: A bruised berry you got from Chef Dente. Restores a bit of PP when eaten

name: Common candy
description: A piece of candy you got from Chef Dente. Restores some PP when eaten.

name: Curry and rice
description: An absolutely essential meal for any party. Enjoy some tasty food alongside other Pokémon!

name: Fresh Water
description: Delicious water that's perfect for making soup. Drink some and spit it out to make things wet.

name: Soda Pop
description: Fizzy, sparkling soda. If you take a sip and spit it out, it becomes seawater

name: Moomoo Milk Coffee
description: Milky coffee with a comfortingly sweet taste. If you take a sip and spit it out, it becomes muddy water!

name: Roserade Tea
description: Tea with a delicate, elegant aroma. If you take a sip and spit it out, it becomes a hot spring!

name: Chili sauce
description: Sauce with an enticingly spicy flavor. If you take a sip and spit it out, it becomes lava!

name: Flower table
description: A table with a flower-patterned tablecloth. It makes any meal feel like a picnic

name: Flower cushion
description: A cute flower-shaped cushion. It would look nice on some grassy ground.

name: Flowery table setting
description: A set of cute tableward. The placemat has a Jumpluff pattern!

name: Lunch box
description: A lunch box packed with Pokémon-shaped food. The perfect meal for a picnic lunch

name: Hoppip water bottle
description: This water bottle with a shoulder strap is perfect for picnics! The Hoopip pattern is very cute.

name: Juice trio
description: Bottles of colored juices. One of them is capped off nicely with a flower-shaped lid.

name: Flower garland
description: An adorable wall decoration made with a variety of colorful flowers

name: Flower backpack
description: The big flower makes this backpack stand out! Looks like it could hold everything you need for a picnic
